1:
J'nangho has tasked you with reeling in three fresh haddock for the Moonfire Faire festivities. Haul them in on the North Isle of Endless Summer, in hopes that you might claim a Faire voucher as your reward.

※Please note that you will not be able to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, check the Lodestone.
